requirements.task_name: Book the cheapest adult beginner group tennis class this weekend after 5:00 PM under $35
requirements.task_description: Find adult beginner group classes for the upcoming weekend, filter to evening sessions starting at or after 5:00 PM, and book the cheapest option that costs less than $35 so it appears in your cart or booking summary.

requirements.task_name: Choose the cheaper membership plan that includes at least 4 group sessions per month and send an inquiry
requirements.task_description: Compare membership plans, find two options that include at least 4 group sessions per month, choose the cheaper monthly plan between them, and submit a contact or inquiry form specifically about that plan.

required_variables.set_condition: Each time getMembershipPlanDetail is called for an existing plan where plan.included_group_sessions_per_month >= 4, read the current 'task2_comparedPlanIds' value from localStorage (if any), parse it as an array, append this plan's id if it is not already present, and write the updated array back.
required_variables.value_to_set: JSON-encoded array of membership plan IDs for all qualifying (>= 4 group sessions/month) plans whose detail page has been viewed during the session.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to (1) confirm that the user viewed at least two qualifying plans and (2) check that the plan they ultimately inquired about (from membership_inquiries) was the cheaper of the qualifying plans they actually examined, as required by the task.

requirements.task_name: Reserve an indoor hard court for doubles next Wednesday from 7:00 PM to 8:30 PM
requirements.task_description: Use the court booking system to reserve an indoor hard court for a doubles match next Wednesday between 7:00 PM and 8:30 PM, selecting the first available indoor hard court slot that fully covers that 90-minute period and adding four player names to the booking.

requirements.task_name: Schedule the earliest weekday evening private lesson with a 4.5+ rated backhand-specialist coach
requirements.task_description: Find a tennis coach who specializes in backhand improvement with a rating of at least 4.5 stars, and book the earliest available weekday private lesson starting at or after 4:00 PM for a 60-minute session.

requirements.task_name: Enroll a 10-year-old child in a morning half-day tennis camp week starting July 15 under $300
requirements.task_description: Locate junior tennis camps, find a week-long camp starting on July 15 that is suitable for a 10-year-old (age range includes 9–12), choose a morning half-day option costing less than $300, and complete the enrollment form.

requirements.task_name: Create a 3-day weekly training plan for an intermediate player under a total of $120
requirements.task_description: Select three different group activities (such as cardio tennis, strategy workshop, and match play) on three different days in the same week for an intermediate-level adult player, ensuring the combined price of all three bookings is less than $120, and add all sessions to your cart or booking list.

requirements.task_name: Register for a singles tournament next month in the 3.0–3.5 skill bracket
requirements.task_description: Find an upcoming internal tournament scheduled for next month, select the singles event in the 3.0–3.5 skill level bracket, and complete the registration form for that event.

requirements.task_name: Save two training articles (serve technique and injury prevention) to your reading list
requirements.task_description: Locate one article focused on serve technique and another focused on injury prevention from the academy’s articles or blog section, open each article, and add both to your saved items or reading list.
